untranslatable_reason: Signal requires dynamic regime detection (momentum vs mean-reversion classification) and conditional stop-loss width adjustment based on regime. The allowed indicators cannot directly distinguish between momentum and mean-reversion regimes or programmatically switch between tight and relaxed stop losses. ADX alone is insufficient to capture the nuanced fundamental deterioration trigger or the adaptive stop-loss logic described in the signal.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation: Used ADX_14 > 25 as a proxy for momentum/trending regime detection and negative returns as a proxy for fundamental deterioration/price movement. However, this signal fundamentally requires: (1) classification of market regime type (not just trend strength), (2) detection of news/fundamental events (not available in price data), and (3) dynamic stop-loss management that varies by regime—none of which can be fully expressed with the allowed indicators. A complete implementation would require external regime classifier and news sentiment input.
